title: Iron's Lib
description: Provides common functionality and content for Iron's mods
body:
Iron's Lib is a library adding easy-to-reuse frameworks for my mods, as well as a Patreon Integration API layer.

This library currently provides support for:

*   Transmog Table block, and an Armor Transmog Framework.
*   Player Statue Blocks, Player Statue asset generation, and Player Statue structure generation tools
*   Decorative Statue Framework for creating dynamic multiblocks, and rendering baked statue models
*   Patreon Integration support for all of the above features!
